Amritmahal.traits: Long vertical horns with black tips; grey coat; fiery temperament.
Amritmahal.fact: Renowned for power and endurance; historically used by the Mysore army.

Ayrshire.traits: Red and white markings; high set horns; efficient forage conversion.
Ayrshire.fact: Known for high-quality milk production and being a hardy dairy breed.

bachaur.traits: Compact body; white/grey coat; well-developed hump.
bachaur.fact: Specifically suited for heavy agricultural work in the plains of North Bihar.

badri.traits: Small sized hill cattle; black, brown or red coat.
badri.fact: First certified breed of Uttarakhand; milk has very high medicinal value.

Bargur.traits: Brown coat with white patches (Speckled); fast walkers.
Bargur.fact: Specially bred for working in rugged hilly forest terrains.

bhelai.traits: Reddish-brown coat; medium size; hardy nature.
bhelai.fact: Migratory breed traditionally kept by the Gujjar community.

dagri.traits: Small, compact body; predominantly white coat.
dagri.fact: Highly localized breed known for its extreme heat tolerance.

Dangi.traits: Broken red/white coat; oily skin that repels rain.
Dangi.fact: Specifically adapted to survive in extremely heavy rainfall areas.

Deoni.traits: Distinct black and white spots; drooping ears; Gir-like forehead.
Deoni.fact: Bred from Gir and Dangi; highly docile and heat tolerant.

gangatari.traits: Complete white color; medium sized; alert appearance.
gangatari.fact: Found on the fertile banks of the Ganges River.

gaolao.traits: Long narrow face; white coat; very high hump.
gaolao.fact: Noted for exceptional walking and trotting speed for transport.

ghumsari.traits: Grey coat; small sized; short horns.
ghumsari.fact: Survives with minimal resources in low-resource hilly areas.

Gir.traits: Prominent domed forehead; long leaf-like pendulous ears.
Gir.fact: World-famous dairy breed; exported to Brazil to create Nelore cattle.

Hallikar.traits: Long vertical horns; compact and muscular build.
Hallikar.fact: Regarded as the premier draft breed of India for agriculture.

Hariana.traits: White color; small horns; powerful build.
Hariana.fact: The most versatile and popular breed in Northern India.

Himachali Pahari.traits: Small size; thick coat for cold; agile.
Himachali Pahari.fact: Adapted specifically for rocky mountain terrains.

Kangayam.traits: Grey/black coat; short horns; very powerful neck.
Kangayam.fact: Famous for the traditional Jallikattu sport in Tamil Nadu.

Kankrej.fact: Heaviest Indian breed; known for the rhythmic 'Sawai Chal' gait.

Kenkatha.traits: Small size; grey coat; attractive small horns.
Kenkatha.fact: Sturdy breed adapted to Bundelkhand's semi-arid climate.

Khariar.fact: Resistant to common tropical diseases in forest areas.

kherigarh.traits: White coat; active and very fast walkers.
kherigarh.fact: Ideally suited for light plowing and carting work.

Khillari.traits: Long curved horns; sleek powerful build; grey color.
Khillari.fact: Famous for speed and endurance in bullock cart racing.

Konkan Kapila.traits: Black or brown coat; small to medium size.
Konkan Kapila.fact: Well adapted to the humid, coastal Konkan climate.

Kosali.traits: Small size; grey or white coat; short horns.
Kosali.fact: Resistant to pests and thrives on low-quality forage.

Krishna_Valley.traits: Massive frame; deep loosely built body; short horns.
Krishna_Valley.fact: Bred for heavy plowing in the black cotton soil of the valley.

Ladakhi.traits: Thick hair coat; small stature; high hump.
Ladakhi.fact: Only Indian breed capable of surviving at 15,000+ feet altitude.

Lakhimi.traits: Small stature; multi-colored; humid climate adapted.
Lakhimi.fact: Crucial for local organic farming in North-East India.

Malnad_gidda.traits: Tiny dwarf size; very short horns; multi-colored.
Malnad_gidda.fact: Milk and urine have significant medicinal value in Ayurveda.

malvi.traits: Sturdy build; white or grey coat; thick horns.
malvi.fact: Adapted for survival in rocky and semi-arid terrain.

Mewati.traits: Docile nature; white color; medium horns.
Mewati.fact: Important breed for small-scale dairy and farm work.

motu.traits: Dwarf hill breed; brown or grey; short stature.
motu.fact: Primary source of draught power for tribal farmers in hills.

nagori.traits: Fast trotting gait; sleek and powerful body.
nagori.fact: Considered the best trotting breed in the world for transport.

Nari.traits: Large frame; white coat; lyre horns.
Nari.fact: Highly resistant to heat and common tropical diseases.

Nimari.traits: Distinct copper-red coat with white spots.
Nimari.fact: Highly beautiful and distinctive draught breed of Central India.

Ongole.traits: Large muscular frame; white coat; short horns.
Ongole.fact: Global benchmark for hardiness; exported to create Nelore cattle.

Poda Thirupu.fact: Used primarily for agricultural work in the Deccan plateau.

ponwar.traits: Black and white markings; small size; active.
ponwar.fact: Active walkers suited for light agricultural work.

Pulikulam.traits: Grey/black coat; short horns; powerful neck.
Pulikulam.fact: Indigenous breed used in the traditional Jallikattu sport.

Punganur.traits: World's shortest humped cattle; dwarf stature.
Punganur.fact: Milk has exceptionally high fat content (8%); used in rituals.

Purnea.traits: Small sized; white/grey; hardy for floods.
Purnea.fact: Adapted to the flood-prone plains of North Bihar.

Rathi.fact: Life-line of farmers in the extreme heat of the Thar desert.

Red kandhari.traits: Deep mahogany red color; majestic hump.
Red kandhari.fact: A source of cultural pride and power in Marathwada.

Red_Sindhi.traits: Deep red color; compact build; high hump.
Red_Sindhi.fact: Extremely heat tolerant and resistant to tropical diseases.

Shweta Kapila.traits: All white; small to medium size.
Shweta Kapila.fact: Native breed adapted to coastal forest areas.

siri.traits: Thick coat; black/white patches; massive hump.
siri.fact: Only Indian breed adapted to high-altitude cold.

Tharparkar.traits: White or grey coat; lyre horns; deep body.
Tharparkar.fact: Excellent desert adaptability; coat changes color with seasons.

thutho.fact: Newly registered breed essential for hilly Nagaland.

Umblachery.fact: Calves are born red and turn grey upon maturity.

Vechur.traits: Extremely small dwarf; light red or grey.
Vechur.fact: World's smallest cow; milk has unique medicinal qualities.
